km.Cornwall, England, United Kingdom: ខូរនវ៉ល, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore於1287年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1385年在他的家鄉享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore于1287年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1385年在他的家乡享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore was born in 1287, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1385, in his hometown, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore est né en 1287, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1385, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore wurde 1287 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 98 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore è nato il nel 1287 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1385, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.Cornwall, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmoreは1287年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1385年に故郷で98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore(은)는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 그의 고향에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore nasceu em 1287, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1385, em sua cidade natal, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore родился в 1287 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1385 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Poltesmore nació en 1287, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1385, en su pueblo, a la edad de 98 años.
